title: Synchrony (SYF) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Synchrony (SYF) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.48 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.44 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.47 per share a year ago.

title: Synchrony Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , Oct. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony Financial (NYSE: SYF) today announced its third quarter 2023 results for the period ending September 30, 2023.

title: Synchrony Announces Quarterly Common Stock Dividend of $0.25 Per Share
text: Company also declares preferred stock dividend STAMFORD, Conn. , Oct. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony Financial (NYSE: SYF) announced today that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share of common stock, payable on November 9, 2023 to holders of record at the close of business on November 1, 2023.

title: Synchrony Unveils Great Transformation Initiative with Great Place To Work
text: New Leadership Training Program Designed to Encourage Candor, Empathy and Accountability STAMFORD, Conn. , Oct. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) today announced its participation in the Great Transformation initiative with Great Place To Work.

title: Veterinary Growth Partners Selects Synchrony's CareCredit as Financing Solution for Members
text: Partnership To Offer Special Financing Options, Modern Digital Payment Features and Financial Education Resources STAMFORD, Conn. , Oct. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a leading consumer finance company, has announced that its CareCredit health and wellness credit card will now be a financing option for members of Veterinary Growth Partners (VGP), a veterinary management services organization that connects veterinary practices with resources that maximize efficiency and optimize profitability.

title: Synchrony: A Buy As Credit Deterioration Slows
text: Shares of Synchrony Financial have been falling due to concerns about rising credit card delinquencies. Despite underperforming expectations, SYF stock has outperformed mid-sized banks. The company's credit quality has deteriorated, but there are signs that it may be leveling out, creating a compelling opportunity.

title: Americans May Forgo Dental Treatments Due to Cost, Risking Overall Health, New Synchrony Research Reveals
text: Dental Care Costs Can Range from $51,000 for Single Adult Coverage to $95,000 for Couple and Family Coverage During a Lifetime According to the Synchrony "Lifetime of Dental Care Costs" Study 58% of Americans Say Dental Care is Not Affordable STAMFORD, Conn. , Oct. 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Costs are a major factor impacting American's dental care, according to new study results from Synchrony, a leading consumer financial services company, conducted on behalf of the company's leading dental financial solution, CareCredit.

title: Bank stocks outpace broad market into the red as higher bond yields impact the value of their portfolios
text: A spike in bond yields on Tuesday threatened to pose yet another headache for down-beaten bank stocks, which moved into the red more deeply than the broader market.
